settings.headline: Stop the 3AM Ear Scratching and Head Shaking for Good.
settings.subtitle: The finger-fit wipe that reaches the hidden folds of your dog's ear where traditional Q-tips and liquid drops can't go.
settings.description: PawPoint gives you finger-control precision so you can wipe hidden folds, lift away visible gunk, and clean the areas bulky tools often miss.

settings.title: Cotton swabs
settings.text: They often push debris deeper instead of removing what is stuck in the hidden folds.

settings.title: Liquid drops
settings.text: They can pool at the bottom while missing the sticky debris clinging to the ear canal walls.

settings.title: Regular wipes
settings.text: They slide across the surface instead of wrapping with your finger and reaching the curves where the gunk hides.

settings.title: Current tools do not fail. They just cannot reach the real target.
settings.text: A dog's ear canal is shaped very differently from a human ear. The hidden folds and deeper curves are exactly where debris, wax, and irritation-prone buildup collect. Most tools simply cannot clean those areas properly.
settings.analogy_title: You need better control, not a harsher cleaner.
settings.analogy_text: PawPoint wraps around your finger so you can feel the curves, guide the wipe with precision, and clean the areas generic tools usually miss.

settings.title: Visible debris removal
settings.text: The first use lifts away the visible gunk sitting in the folds, providing immediate relief from surface irritation.

settings.title: Reduced scratching
settings.text: Consistency in cleaning the deeper curves helps keep the environment stable, reducing the urge to scratch and shake.

settings.title: Maintenance routine established
settings.text: Once the initial buildup is gone, the routine shifts to maintenance, keeping the ears clean and clear long-term.

settings.title: A timeline built around better control and visible results.
settings.text: Ear hygiene is about consistency and precision. First you lift the visible debris, then you settle the immediate irritation, and finally you maintain a clear environment with regular finger-control cleaning.

settings.title: Slip on your finger
settings.text: Slide the wipe over your index finger so you control pressure and direction more precisely.

settings.title: Feel the ear's curves
settings.text: Use your finger to follow the natural folds and curves where buildup usually hides.

settings.title: Wipe with gentle pressure
settings.text: Lift away visible debris with controlled, gentle motion instead of poking or flooding the ear.

settings.title: See the removed debris
settings.text: The brown gunk on the wipe makes the clean visible, satisfying, and easy to repeat consistently.

settings.question: How deep can these safely clean?
settings.answer: PawPoint is designed for gentle, controlled cleaning of the visible folds and reachable curves of the ear without aggressive poking.

settings.question: How quickly will I see results?
settings.answer: You can usually see visible debris on the wipe immediately, which makes the cleaning result obvious right away.

settings.question: How often should I use them?
settings.answer: That depends on your dog's ear-care routine, but PawPoint is designed to fit easily into recurring maintenance.
